title: Made Well — Outer Store (madewell.json)
description: The OUTER store: one per project, permanent. Holds the Discovery queue and the outer lifecycle pointer. The inner loop's per-cycle state lives in .madewell/cycles/<id>.json (see cycle.schema.json). The event log (status.jsonl) wins when a store disagrees with it.

project.description: The project name, in the person's own words.

profile.description: Project-pinned profile fallback. A local .madewell/profile file overrides this.

stage.description: The OUTER lifecycle pointer. (The inner phase lives in the cycle store.)

summary.description: One sentence — what's happening right now.

openThread.description: Exactly where to pick up next session.

language.description: The person's own words for things. concept -> their word.

discovery.description: THE OUTER QUEUE. Shaped work-items waiting to be Committed. The outer loop drains this.

dependsOn.description: IDs of sibling discovery items that must reach Land before this item can be Committed. Empty or absent = no dependency = immediately eligible. Backward-compatible — existing items without this field are treated as having no dependencies.

active.description: Committed items currently in Build. Each is a lightweight pointer to its cycle store — the detail lives there, not here.

id.description: The discovery item id this came from.

cycle.description: Path to the cycle store, e.g. .madewell/cycles/c001.json
